description: Recognizing the only way to stop Malick and the fleet is through personal sacrifice, Daisy detonates the ship's fuel supply in a last, desperate move, killing Malick and saving her friends on Earth. The act appears fatal, leaving her team to mourn her apparent loss, while the Chronicom threat is finally neutralized.

transcript.line: We have to let her do her part, no matter what the cost.
Do you think you're winning? 'Cause I can't tell.
It's a close one, but I could go all day.
Good. That's what we were hoping for.
Those sparks? That means Kora's purged all the Chronicom data from the planet. Turned the attack to our side. Mission accomplished.
Down on the planet. But up here... these ships are about to vaporize your friends down below. And you can't stop that. There is no way to kill me without killing yourself.
This is what we were fighting for.
